name: agenttape
description: Record, replay, diff, and regression-test Claude Code agent sessions

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @agenttape/core build && pnpm --filter @agenttape/replay-engine build && pnpm --filter @agenttape/diff-engine build && pnpm --filter @agenttape/test-runner build && pnpm --filter @agenttape/integration-claude build && pnpm --filter @agenttape/cli build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @agenttape/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @agenttape/replay-engine typecheck && pnpm --filter @agenttape/diff-engine typecheck && pnpm --filter @agenttape/test-runner typecheck && pnpm --filter @agenttape/integration-claude typecheck && pnpm --filter @agenttape/cli typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm ci:diff
